series_metadata.series_title: Administrative complaint alleging a violation of Title III of the Help America Vote Act (HAVA)
series_metadata.series_description: Documents and correspondence related to an administrative complaint filed by an individual alleging a violation of Title III of the Help America Vote Act of 2002 under Ohio’s administrative complaint procedures.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain two (2) years following final resolution of complaint, then may destroy. ; Electronic: Retain two (2) years following final resolution of complaint, then may destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
